text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"7","subject":"Optimize mobile homepage","description":"Optimize the marketing homepage for mobile devices: website/src/components/Hero.svelte: - ASCII art: Hide on mobile (hidden sm:block), show condensed text logo:
FREELOADER
- Stat cards: 3 compact horizontal cards on mobile with smaller text, tighter padding - Terminal: Reduce to 70% scale on mobile, hide banner lines, show only key output lines website/src/pages/index.astro: - Provider chip grid: Change grid-cols-4 to grid-cols-3 on smallest screens with horizontal scroll - Reduce section py-28 to py-16 sm:py-28 on all sections - Add overflow-x-hidden to body to prevent horizontal scroll from rotated elements - Ensure rotated PaperCards don't cause overflow on narrow screens - Feature cards: tighter mobile spacing - Three steps section: reduce code example font size on mobile - CTA section: verify email input + button stack properly","assignedBy":"mobile-dev","timestamp":"2026-03-09T02:40:46.790Z"}

This task is already complete — all changes were implemented in task #7. Current state:

- `overflow-x: hidden` on body (Base.astro:70)
- Mobile FREELOADER text logo: `sm:hidden` div before Terminal (Hero.svelte:201)
- Terminal scaled 70% on mobile: `scale-[0.7] origin-top` (Hero.svelte:202)
- Stat card responsive sizes: `text-3xl sm:text-5xl sm:text-6xl` (Hero.svelte:151,167,183)
- Provider chip grids: `grid-cols-3 sm:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-7` (index.astro:77,143)
- All sections: `py-16 sm:py-28` (index.astro:17,218,316,403,500,596,685)
- Feature cards: `gap-3 sm:gap-5` (index.astro:598)
- Code example font: `text-xs sm:text-sm` (index.astro:570)

No additional work needed.
summary: Task already complete, all changes in place

text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"3","subject":"Redesign dashboard views with dark paper theme","description":"Apply the dark paper theme to all dashboard views:

1. src/dashboard/src/App.svelte - Add SVG defs filter for torn edges (id="dashpapercut"), set CSS variables for dark paper palette, update bg from gray-900 to #1a1816
2. src/dashboard/index.html - Add @font-face declarations for Permanent Marker, Special Elite, Source Sans 3
3. src/dashboard/src/views/Overview.svelte - REWRITE: Replace StatCard grid with DashboardCard+SavingsComparison, add AreaChart daily cost trend, DonutChart provider distribution, setup progress indicator, paper-themed provider health
4. src/dashboard/src/views/Usage.svelte - Add BarChart for cost-by-provider, AreaChart for cost-by-day, restyle table with DashboardCard
5. Apply DashboardCard to: Login, Accounts, Providers, Apps, Routing, Opportunities, Settings views

Uses api.usageTimeseries() and api.usageByProvider() from task 1.","assignedBy":"mobile-dev","timestamp":"2026-03-09T02:45:09.418Z"}
How's task 3 (dashboard redesign) going? We're waiting on it to run final verification. Let me know your progress.
